origin.name: Somalia
origin.key_document: Death certificate (requires certified English translation where available)
origin.source: FCDO Somalia travel advice, updated 2025; FCDO emergency line guidance
origin.cremation_note: Cremation is not available in Somalia. Full body repatriation is the only option when feasible.

destinations.name: United Kingdom
key_documents: Death certificate from local authority (certified English translation required)
special_rules: There is no resident UK Embassy in Mogadishu. Consular assistance is provided via the British High Commission in Nairobi.
The FCDO advises against all travel to Somalia. Contact the FCDO emergency line immediately: +44 (0)20 7008 5000.
Security conditions severely limit access, movement, and repatriation logistics.
Documentation availability and quality varies greatly by region.
destinations.dest_reception: The UK funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. All documentation must be in certified English translation. The coroner for the district is notified. Straightforward cases proceed directly to funeral arrangements.
destinations.dest_consular_note: FCDO 24-hour emergency line: +44 (0)20 7008 5000. Consular assistance is provided via the British High Commission in Nairobi. They cannot pay for or arrange repatriation.
destinations.seo_title: Somalia to UK Repatriation: Guidance for Families
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in Somalia. Repatriation is very complex. FCDO liaison via Nairobi and all documentation handled. Contact us 24/7 for immediate support.
